task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from a full S3 URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket/path/to/file.txt') and extract just the bucket name
Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that specifies the runtime as 'python3.11', timeout as 60 seconds, and memory as 256 MB
Write a Python function that takes an AWS IAM ARN string and returns the resource name (the part after the last forward slash)
